name: 5 NIGHTS AT BOBR KURWA
short_description: Beaver Lyolik ate too many mushrooms and became a KURWA! Only the chosen ones can survive these 5 nights!
detailed_description:
Beaver Lyolik was once a good guy, but one night everything changed! He became BEAVER KURWA! His fangs came out, and his eyes swelled up! The evil beaver ate all the cows and started hunting his brother!

   And how it all began... We are sitting with the beaver at the table, preparing a log for dinner, but what happened, happened... Zhorik called the special agencies to combat such monsters! A superhero, Hamster Saveliy, is rushing to help! Now our hero will have to hold out for 5 nights until help arrives! Help Zhorik not to become lunch for his brother!

   In this scary horror game about an evil beaver, you survive in a hut, from which you can leave in order to get the resources necessary for survival. Manage to saw boards and board up the windows before Beaver Kurva gets you! You will also have to brew a potion and light the fireplace, while looking into the cameras to assess how far away the scary beaver is! Keep the house boarded up, poison the beaver with a potion, or a scary screamer will come out!

   The game is a survival horror in the style of "point-and-click". You control the character from the first person by clicking the mouse. You have the ability to move left and right, go outside to get resources. It is extremely important for you to calculate your time correctly, because one awkward movement and a scary screamer will not keep you waiting long!

supported_languages:
English, Polish, Russian*
*languages with full audio support
